summary: Iteration 3 testing completed. All reported bugs fixed and verified: FlowBot follow-up questions work without KeyError, Excel exports work with proper auth tokens, Dashboard customization with localStorage persistence works correctly. Backend 100% pass rate (16/16 tests), Frontend 100% functional.

issues: Chart rendering warnings - width/height (-1) should be greater than 0 (known issue from iteration 1, cosmetic only)

passed_tests: Admin login with admin@spectraflow.com / Admin123!
FlowBot initial analysis returns AI recommendations
FlowBot follow-up question 'analiza la campana Real Estate' works without KeyError
FlowBot question about deals works (d.get('name', d.get('title', '')) fix verified)
FlowBot question about contacts works
Excel export leads with auth token - downloads leads_spectra.xlsx
Excel export CRM contacts with auth token - downloads crm_contacts_spectra.xlsx
Excel export without auth returns 401 (security verified)
Dashboard stats endpoint returns all required fields
Dashboard customization dialog opens with Personalizar button
Dashboard panel toggles work (KPIs, Pipeline, Activity, Rates)
Dashboard KPI toggles work (11 individual KPIs)
Dashboard preferences persist in localStorage after page refresh
Dashboard reset button restores default preferences
Dashboard shows Tasas de Conversion panel (Apertura, Respuesta, CRM)
FlowBot auto-scroll to bottom when new messages appear (useRef implementation)
CRM contacts list endpoint works
CRM deals list endpoint works
CRM stats endpoint works
Leads list endpoint works
Leads search endpoint works
Campaigns list endpoint works
seed_data_creation: None required - existing data sufficient for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bugs from iteration 3 are fixed: 1) FlowBot KeyError on deals without 'name' field - fixed with d.get('name', d.get('title', '')) at line 1416 of server.py, 2) FlowBot auto-scroll implemented with useRef in FlowBotButton.js, 3) Excel exports now use api.get with responseType:'blob' for proper auth token handling, 4) Dashboard customization with Personalizar dialog, panel/KPI toggles, localStorage persistence, and new Tasas de Conversion panel. Campaign simulation still uses random data (MOCKED).

flowbot_keyerror_fix.fix: Changed d['name'] to d.get('name', d.get('title', '')) at line 1416

flowbot_autoscroll.issue: Messages area not auto-scrolling to bottom
flowbot_autoscroll.fix: Added useRef and useEffect with scrollIntoView in FlowBotButton.js

excel_export_auth.issue: Excel export not working from UI (auth token not sent)
excel_export_auth.fix: Changed to api.get with responseType:'blob' in LeadsPage.js and CrmSyncPage.js

dashboard_customization.feature: Customizable dashboard with show/hide panels and KPIs
dashboard_customization.implementation: Personalizar dialog with Switch toggles, localStorage persistence

conversion_rates_panel.implementation: Shows Apertura, Respuesta, CRM conversion rates
